verifier.note: Same target model as inputs/qwen3-32b-json/reference. See README in this dir for the recommended symlink layout.

drafter.note: No drafter model. The request's `prediction.content` (the buggy original code) is tokenized at request handling time and used as the draft sequence for speculative verification against the target. See OBJECTIVE.md for the lookup-proposer + re-anchor algorithm.
